_comment: Channel-based identity map. Each Slack channel is dedicated to one HubSpot account/deal. Populated by sales ops when a channel is created for a new deal. This fixes the multi-account B2B problem: a seller works on dozens of accounts simultaneously, so mapping by user_id is ambiguous — mapping by channel_id is deterministic.

_strategies.dedicated_channel: One Slack channel per account (#deal-acme-corp). Channel ID maps directly to account_id. Requires sales ops discipline.
_strategies.slack_connect: External users (prospects) are invited to a shared channel. Their corporate email resolves to a single HubSpot Contact → Account. Most robust for enterprise deals.
_strategies.ner_fallback: For shared internal channels: extract company name mentions via NER/LLM and fuzzy-match against HubSpot company list. Higher cost, higher recall.
